arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss reveals transfer development over Ryley Towler’s future after January loan exit talk
arts.sum: John Mousinho has ruled out a January exit for Ryley Towler as he challenged the fans’ favourite to force his way back into his first-team thinking.

arts.ttl: Tommy Conway injury latest amid Latte Lath transfer uncertainty while Middlesbrough duo return
arts.sum: Michael Carrick is hopeful Tommy Conway will soon be back in training for Middlesbrough as he reaches the end stages of his rehabilitation at a good time for the club. The Boro boss was clear that he expects Latte Lath to be involved at Portsmouth this weekend, despite reports suggesting that a deal between Boro and Atlanta is progressing.

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Latte Lath and Ben Doak's Middlesbrough availability for Portsmouth amid transfer talk
arts.sum: Michael Carrick expects both Emmanuel Latte Lath and Ben Doak to be in the Middlesbrough squad at Portsmouth this weekend despite mounting transfer speculation involving the pair. Despite that, Latte Lath remains a Boro player and is set to be involved as per at Fratton Park unless anything were to suddenly change between now and Saturday - which Carrick appeared to rule out.
